site.title: Krynet.ai — Next-Generation Privacy Communication
site.description: Iceland-based, ultra-private, lightweight, and efficient instant messaging and VOIP platform. Mixed-source architecture built for absolute privacy and security.

header.title: Krynet.ai
header.intro: Secure, private, and lightning-fast. Krynet.ai is an ultra-lightweight, mixed-source privacy-first communication platform.

ceo.name: Johnny
ceo.title: CEO
ceo.bio: Directing core operations to set international standards in secure communication pipelines.

highlights: Ultra-lightweight execution optimizing CPU and RAM boundaries
Asynchronous End-to-End Encryption protocol layer isolation
Passwordless configuration using WebAuthn hardware keys
Minimal metadata storage profile enforcing user anonymity
Compatible with open-source frontends and alternative installation indexes

features.title: Native plugin and sandboxed extension modules
E2EE messaging, voice loops, and media handshakes
Default Cloud-Routed VOIP Infrastructure
features.description: Voice and video calls are proxy-routed through safe cloud infrastructure to obscure direct connections.

features.title: Tor-Encapsulated Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Calling Mode
features.description: Optional direct P2P pipeline that funnels streaming layers through Tor to stop IP metadata leaks.

features.title: Passwordless MFA utilizing native hardware keys
Isolated search capabilities running zero tracker analytics
Sedicii Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) Age Assurance
features.description: Verifies age requirements cryptographically without disclosing actual identity documents.

features.title: ipinfo.io Suspicious Login & IP Intelligence Routing
features.description: Fetches IP data locally to detect anomalies and flag unrecognized network locations.

features.title: DNS.SB Privacy-Focused DNS Integration
features.description: Routes network queries via DNS.SB for completely log-free, highly secure, and optimized resolution.

features.title: Stripe Gateway integration for traditional processing
Cryptomus Gateway for privacy cryptocurrency transactions
Standard UGC Creator Payout Structure (50% - 55% Share)
features.description: Default baseline revenue split for independent user-generated content deployment.

features.title: Premium Showcase Allocation (60% - 70% Share)
features.description: Elevated incentive program tier unlocking higher profit retention splits for front-page highlighted assets.

features.title: Core Application Layers — Proprietary Closed Security License
features.description: Core routing protocols, server binaries, and encryption pipeline designs are closed source to preserve integrity.

features.title: Client UI & Extensions Layout — GPL-3.0 Open License
features.description: Visual presentation shell and layouts are fully auditable and distributed under GPL-3.0.

features.title: LibreJS Compatibility
features.description: Enforces freedom-respecting, script-restricted execution layout compliance.

features.title: Krynet, LLC – Incorporated under Icelandic jurisdiction
Fully compliant with GDPR and Icelandic privacy foundation directives
Official Direct Source Code Repositories
features.description: Official open client code bases are public for transparency validations.

features.title: Decentralized Distribution Packages
features.description: Available via F-Droid, AltStore, and raw packages to eliminate vendor surveillance.

footer.text: Krynet.ai © 2030 — Iceland-based, mixed-source instant messaging & communication infrastructure. Built for anonymity-first user spaces.
